title: Boss Update
description: This mod adds three new distinct bosses with custom drops and powers. (also available in multiplayer worlds.)
body:
Get ready—this mod cranks your adventure up to epic!
Jump into battles against brand-new, super-cool bosses, each packed with unique powers and custom drops. And the best part? Defeat them and you get their abilities! Summon your own loyal minions, unleash wild attacks, and discover tons of other awesome powers waiting to be claimed.

But that’s not all—there’s a cheeky little easter egg hidden in your journey. Take a fall from about 7–9 blocks and watch your character break into a hilarious flying animation. Totally worth the tumble.

Feeling victorious?
Try using the command:
/animation @p
Your character should perform a winning animation — but the Essential Mod might sometimes get in the way. Don’t worry, though: you can still fully enjoy and play the mod even with Essential Mod installed!

Have fun, and enjoy the chaos!
